column8: Better conflict of interest policies with clear recusal guidelines
column9: Focus on quality of decicion making process is the single most important thing to get right now. This should not be a volunteer only position be it DRep, SPO or CC. How we improve the quality can be through various means such as tooling, incentives, publication / history, timing of the process (voting periods?), legitimacy (the current no incentive models does not support a high degree of legitimacy as it is quite centralizing in terms of who can and will have the time for the effort required) and the list goes on I am sure there are many other factors. Also M10-A should have had a question of compensation.
